title: STUDENT AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211info
text: LINN BENTON LINCOLN EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT STUDENT AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Serves children with behavior, social service, and academic achievement needs. Also assists school districts by supporting them in the search for practical solutions to student behavior, instructional improvement, and social service needs in the following areas: -Attendance Services: Interventions and resources for staff and parents regarding school attendance and truancy. -Behavior Consultant Services: Support for students, parents, school staff, and community agencies to assist students with behavioral or emotional issues. Includes assessment, observation, interviews, safety risk assessment, and recommended interventions, such as counseling, skill training, and referrals to other services. -Family Support Project: Provides information and referrals to community resources, youth activities, home-based parenting support, counseling, and more. -Youth Service Team (YST): Multidisciplinary teams provide integrated services to students in Linn County, including referrals to counseling and community-based services, youth and family activities, help navigating social service programs, outreach and crisis intervention, and more. 905 4th Avenue SE Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Varies by program Email (541) 812-2690 ..12.. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 812-2600 Main phone (541) 812-2617 FAX Main phone (541) 812-2690 Nancy Griffith [email protected] Main phone (541) 812-2711 Mandie Wood [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton, Lincoln, and Linn Counties Services: Mental Health Evaluation School Based Integrated Services Student Counseling Services Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - HOME SCHOOL EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - SPECIAL EDUCATION SERVICES REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - EARLY INTERVENTION/EARLY CHILDHOOD SPECIAL EDUCATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LINN BENTON LINCOLN EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT
